fato_historico: 1865: The first ascent of the Matterhorn is completed by Edward Whymper and his party, four of whom die on the descent.
energia_do_dia: The cosmos invites you to reach for the peaks, Pisces. Just as daring climbers once touched the clouds on a jagged mountain, you may find yourself seeking new heights in your emotional landscape. Remember that the journey is as sacred as the summit; consider honoring your path today and cherish the beauty of your own steady progress toward light.
frase_do_dia: Every mountain you climb brings you closer to your own inner starlight.
significado_numero: Represents the harmony between your intuition and your worldly creative ambitions.
conselho: Trust your inner compass as you navigate toward your most beautiful aspirations today.
